# bextool

> Open-source multi-project scaffolding CLI for modern apps.

## Canonical
- https://bextool.dev/
- https://bextool.dev/docs

## Project Links
- Repository: https://github.com/bextool-cli/bextool
- Website Source: https://github.com/bextool-cli/bextool-website
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/bextool

## Key Topics
- CLI scaffolding
- starter templates
- frontend/backend/full-stack/mobile/extension starters
- documentation and usage guides
